Package org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.databases

@NonNullApi @NonNullFields package org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.databases
Database integration with Vault.
Author:
Mark Paluch
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.springframework.cloud.vault.config
    Core Vault support classes.
    org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.aws
    AWS integration with Vault.
    org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.consul
    Consul integration with Vault.
    org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.rabbitmq
    RabbitMQ integration with Vault.
  • Class
    Description
    DatabaseSecretProperties
    Configuration properties interface for database secrets.
    VaultCassandraProperties
    Configuration properties for Vault using the Apache Cassandra integration.
    VaultConfigDatabaseBootstrapConfiguration
    Bootstrap configuration providing support for the Database secret backends such as Database, Apache Cassandra, Couchbase and MongoDB.
    VaultConfigDatabaseBootstrapConfiguration.DatabaseSecretBackendMetadataFactory
    SecretBackendMetadataFactory for Database integration using DatabaseSecretProperties.
    VaultCouchbaseProperties
    Configuration properties for Vault using the Couchbase integration.
    VaultDatabaseProperties
    Configuration properties for Vault using the Database integration.
    VaultDatabasesProperties
    Configuration properties for multiple database secrets using the database backend.
    VaultElasticsearchProperties
    Configuration properties for Vault using the Elasticsearch integration.
    VaultMongoProperties
    Configuration properties for Vault using the MongoDB integration.
    VaultMySqlProperties
    Deprecated.
    since 2.0.
    VaultPostgreSqlProperties
    Deprecated.
    since 2.0.
